pricing.refundPolicy: Free retry available on 2-Step + Free Retry and 1-Step + Free Retry. If passed without using second chance or resets, the initial fee is refunded with the third payout. No refunds once trading begins.

payouts.schedule: First payout always after 21 days. Subsequent payout interval selectable at checkout: 3, 7, 14, or 21 days. Instant model starts at 70% split on first payout, then switches to chosen split from second payout onward. If second chance is used, profit split permanently becomes 50%.

rules.consistencyRule: 3 profitable trading days required with profit/loss of 0.5% of account size (Instant and Flash Activation funded stage). Flash Activation funded stage adds 30% daily consistency rule. All $300K accounts have 60% consistency rule plus 5 minimum trading days. Risk limit: no more than half of daily loss limit on a single asset on the same day (funded stage only). Lot size changes monitored for consistency compliance.
rules.notes: Six challenge models: 2-Step + Free Retry ($7K–$300K, fees from $41, 5% daily DD, 5–10% selectable max DD, static max DD + EOD daily DD, free retry available — but using it permanently cuts profit split to 50%), 1-Step + Free Retry (3% daily DD, selectable max DD 5%/6%/8%/9%/10%, free retry available — same 50% permanent split penalty), LITE 2-Step ($5K–$300K, fees from $13, 4% daily DD, 6–10% selectable max DD, no second chance), LITE 1-Step (3% daily DD, selectable max DD 5%/6%/7%/8%/10%, no second chance), Instant ($7K–$100K, fees from $159, 3% daily DD trailing, 6% max DD, no profit target, 3 profitable days with 0.5% P&L required for payout, first payout at 70% then chosen split from second payout onward), Flash Activation ($25K–$200K, $5 evaluation fee + activation fee $159–$989 within 29 days, evaluation uses 3% daily DD and 6% static max DD with 6% profit target; funded stage switches to trailing max DD and requires 3 profitable days with 0.5% positive P&L plus 30% daily consistency rule). Profit split selectable at checkout: 60%, 70%, 80%, or 95%. Payout interval selectable at checkout: 3, 7, 14, or 21 days — first payout is always after 21 days regardless of chosen interval. All $300K accounts have 60% consistency rule and 5 minimum trading days instead of 3. News trading is allowed with no restrictions. Weekend holding is allowed by default. Weekend trading (opening/closing positions on weekends) is not allowed unless the weekend trading add-on is purchased. Copy trading permitted between your own accounts only — no social platform mirroring. EAs allowed as support tools only — must not trade independently with hidden or fully automated strategies; hidden or non-communicated EA use can lead to termination. HFT, latency arbitrage, hedging, and micro scalping banned. Account sharing, account rolling, and IP sharing strictly forbidden. Scalping allowed only with add-on (positions must be held 30+ seconds). Risk limit of no more than half of daily loss limit on a single asset on the same day applies in funded stage only, not during evaluation. Some funded-stage rule violations are treated as soft breaches — these do not always result in instant closure and can lead to a reduced payout split or reset instead. Inactivity rule: accounts terminated after 29 days without a single trade. Maximum 50 active challenges at once; total live funded allocation capped at $400,000. Transition to a live account is not automatic — it is by private invitation after review. All capital in challenge and funded accounts is virtual, not real money; profits earned from successful trading are real and paid out. Payments accepted via cards, PayPal, bank transfers, wire transfers, and crypto (max $500 gross per payout cycle via Confirmo.net). Based in Latina, Italy. Platforms: MT5, TradeLocker, and Match-Trader. Restricted country lists differ by platform. MT5 and TradeLocker restricted in US, Cuba, Iran, Iraq, Lebanon, Libya, North Korea, Syria, Somalia, Algeria, Crimea, Donetsk, and Luhansk regions. Match-Trader has its own restricted country list per the FAQ.

markets.instruments: Forex, Indices, Metals (Gold, Silver, Platinum, Palladium), Commodities (Oil, Natural Gas), Crypto CFDs, Stock CFDs, Futures CFDs. Leverage customisable for FX: 1:30 base, 1:50 (+10% fee), or 1:100 (+20% fee). Exact instrument counts not independently verified.

notableFlags: All capital is virtual — not real money; profits are real and paid out
Live account transition by invitation only after review
Mixed public perception — favourable Trustpilot but payout complaints on other platforms
Restricted in US, and several other countries (lists differ by platform)
